sections.paragraph:
Μαριάμ, ἡ indecl. (on the form of the name see the beginning of the preceding entry) Miriam, a prophet and sister of Aaron and Moses (Ex 15:20f; Num 12) 1 Cl 4:11.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 617
